findings.message: New pydantic setting `widget_timeout_s` (env var `APP_WIDGET_TIMEOUT_S` under the `APP_` prefix) is consumed in config/settings.py but is not declared in `.env.example`. The operator-facing env surface diverges from the consumed config, so this knob is undiscoverable when configuring CI/staging/prod and silently falls back to the hardcoded default.
findings.suggestion: Add `APP_WIDGET_TIMEOUT_S=5.0` to `.env.example` (in the framework-managed section alongside the other `APP_*` SLO/runtime vars) so the variable is declared everywhere it is consumed.
